Render a theme email template for one post

Usage:
  nectar build:email [--config <path>] [--output <dir>] [--post <slug>] [--json]

Options:
  -c, --config <path> Config path(s); repeat or comma-separate to deep-merge in order
  -o, --output <dir>  Override build.output_dir from the config (relative path inside the project root)
  --post <slug>       Post slug to render through email.hbs or email-template.hbs. Email-only posts are supported.
  -j, --json          Emit the rendered email result as JSON ({ event, post, template, outputPath })
  -h, --help          Show help for this command

Environment variables:
  Every flag has an env var fallback (CLI flag > env var > .nectarrc > config > default).
  Naming: NECTAR_<COMMAND>_<FLAG> (uppercased, dashes become underscores).
  Example: --config → NECTAR_BUILD_EMAIL_CONFIG

Repeated flags:
  Scalar string flags use the last value.
  List-style string flags accumulate as comma-separated values in argv order.
  Boolean flags use the last positive or negated spelling.

Examples:
  nectar build:email --post=weekly-update
  nectar build:email --post=weekly-update --output dist-email-preview
